title: thymus kotschyanus var. pseudocollinus
intro: Thymus kotschyanus var. pseudocollinus is a variant of the Thymus kotschyanus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as thyme. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus kotschyanus var. pseudocollinus include reducing symptoms of respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Thyme can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as an essential oil to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
